mainEntity.name: How often should I update AEO content?

acceptedAnswer.text: Refresh your highest-value pages regularly, especially if the topic changes or competitors publish stronger answers. Quarterly reviews are a practical baseline for keeping information current, correcting gaps, and maintaining freshness signals that can support citation visibility.
acceptedAnswer.description: Update high-value AEO pages regularly, with quarterly review as a practical starting point. Fresh, accurate content is more likely to keep earning visibility over time.
